title: Galosphere
description: An expansion for caves, including new biomes, mobs, and more.
body:
![galosphere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d19663791867bcd129c0a4203b4da0d1bb4089d_0.webp)

[![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78a0022f6ca61595121e15a79ec9fbdf7938e620.png)](https://discord.gg/HSyVPZTFvF)
[![github](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a174d6d765f585e96d678284c08aa8aa01e9628e.png)](https://github.com/0rc1nus/Galosphere-Main)
[![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eca171b1e0f5f814449b13ae7f0b3b7fcd2f8267.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/galosphere)
[![patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9584f8f573be75269d18cf4973bb3795a424f8bc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/orcinuslounge)
[![x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f28802513ebe97aa693ff6bbfc4373881461afc.png)](https://x.com/OrcinusWasTaken)


📘: General Overview

Galosphere is a mod that aims to improve the underground by adding new content such as new biomes, mechanics, mobs... etc. 

📝: Notes

Forge, NeoForge and Fabric is available for this mod

If you have any suggestions for this mod, you can join my discord server to learn more. 

🧰: Modpack Designers

You can put this mod in your modpack, but make sure to credit us! 

💎: Some Features


<details>
<summary>Crystal Canyons</summary>

![crystal_canyons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae5e45251370078a4e23da2a962240e5a9b05fe.png)

**Crystal canyon** consists of 2 new gems - **allurite & lumiere**, which form huge crystalized structures in the biome. While exploring, you can also find **sparkles**, which can grow allurite and lumiere on their backs!

![p_crystal_canyons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a55b586a5a8ceaf5b5e657aeaa13fa08338834c4_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Lichen Caves</summary>

![lichen_caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6bf6b355abce2ba5f9697c92b65f560ee11e759.png)

**Lichen caves** are overgrown with **lichen moss** and giant mushrooms. You can find little **spectres** peacefully flying and spectating all around the biome

![p_lichen_caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cfa6c1a62ba6e8dd871d57f94c7f06958db61fa_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Pink Salt Caves</summary>

![pink_salt_caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3fb54fcfe3b4441223b00e9b53060394dffb50a.png)

**Pink salt caves** are covered in pink, rose and pastel pink salt. While exploring this salty biome you can stumble upon some mysterious **ancient shrine**...

![p_pink_salt_caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0f103d2711ef204a71b2d823a279f22561025a6_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Forgotten Ruins</summary>

![forgotten_ruins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a52981384d8d63a5ffcb7cb982f1d7795aa54246.png)

**Forgotten ruins** is a rare **underground structure**, filled with **suspicious blocks** for you to brush. You can even find some **moles**, who could give you little **side quests** to complete on your journey

![p_forgotten_ruins_1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2f83fef0a861610e7a243516f94570131d3ec44.png)

![p_forgotten_ruins_2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a8bd0292a6d49b66b1da54deb6272edb4c2424d_0.webp)

</details>
